title: Name resolution problem on podman 1.3.0
body:
**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST?**

/kind bug

**Description**

Name resolution not working in podman 1.3.0. After fixing [this issue](https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/3095) by moving events_logger = "journald" to before runtime = "runc", name resolution is not working in container. Pinging also fails with packet loss. This is all running root containers as root on host.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. 
```
[root@<host> ]# podman run docker.io/alpine ping redhat.com
ping: bad address 'redhat.com'
```
2. 
```
[root@<host>]# podman run docker.io/alpine ping -W10 -c1 10.4.204.55
PING 10.4.204.55 (10.4.204.55): 56 data bytes

--- 10.4.204.55 ping statistics ---
1 packets transmitted, 0 packets received, 100% packet loss
```

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
podman version 1.3.0
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**

